title: Studio Rose Bouquet Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Studio Rose Bouquet Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic studio rose-bouquet editorial portrait for an adult East Asian woman with long soft waves, luminous realistic skin, natural confident expression, built around elegant ivory satin slip dress with delicate straps and open-back suggestion, large bouquet of fresh deep red roses, and standing in studio, turning over shoulder toward camera, bouquet held close. Subject: an adult East Asian woman with long soft waves, luminous realistic skin, natural confident expression is the adult portrait subject. elegant ivory satin slip dress with delicate straps and open-back suggestion and large bouquet of fresh deep red roses create the romantic editorial styling while the fixed studio lighting and rose-bouquet mechanism stay unchanged. Scene: Professional photography studio with warm neutral tones, a circular spotlight projection behind the subject, cinematic shadows, and a clean backdrop that keeps the subject and bouquet dominant. Composition: Fixed editorial portrait composition: subject turns slightly over the shoulder toward camera, bouquet held close to the body, upper body and back/shoulder line emphasized, clean studio negative space, and polished magazine framing. Signature Elements: Large fresh deep-red rose bouquet, circular spotlight halo on studio wall, over-shoulder editorial pose, warm neutral cinematic studio tone, realistic beauty texture, and polished romantic magazine-cover finish. Style: Ultra-realistic editorial portrait photography with soft Douyin-inspired beauty styling, realistic skin texture, luminous pores, natural facial contours, glossy lips, detailed hair movement, satin and rose material realism, and premium studio fashion finish. Color Palette: Warm neutral studio base with ivory or dark wardrobe contrast, deep red rose emphasis, soft pink beauty tones, realistic skin reflections, and elegant cinematic shadow contrast. Lighting: Single large spotlight creating a circular light projection behind the subject, dramatic studio shadows, soft frontal facial clarity, controlled satin highlights, and cinematic contrast around the bouquet. Camera: High-end studio portrait camera, slightly turned three-quarter over-shoulder angle, realistic lens compression, sharp facial and bouquet detail, and clean editorial crop. Materials: Physical satin sheen, rose petal texture, realistic skin, natural hair strands, delicate straps or tailored fabric edges, and crisp bouquet stems without plastic-looking surfaces. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Studio Rose Bouquet Editorial Portrait Variant 02

prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic studio rose-bouquet editorial portrait for an adult East Asian woman with long soft waves, luminous realistic skin, natural confident expression, built around elegant ivory satin slip dress with delicate straps and open-back suggestion, large bouquet of fresh deep red roses, and standing in studio, turning over shoulder toward camera, bouquet held close. Subject: an adult East Asian woman with long soft waves, luminous realistic skin, natural confident expression is the adult portrait subject. elegant ivory satin slip dress with delicate straps and open-back suggestion and large bouquet of fresh deep red roses create the romantic editorial styling while the fixed studio lighting and rose-bouquet mechanism stay unchanged. Scene: Professional photography studio with warm neutral tones, a circular spotlight projection behind the subject, cinematic shadows, and a clean backdrop that keeps the subject and bouquet dominant. Composition: Fixed editorial portrait composition: subject turns slightly over the shoulder toward camera, bouquet held close to the body, upper body and back/shoulder line emphasized, clean studio negative space, and polished magazine framing. Signature Elements: Large fresh deep-red rose bouquet, circular spotlight halo on studio wall, over-shoulder editorial pose, warm neutral cinematic studio tone, realistic beauty texture, and polished romantic magazine-cover finish. Style: Ultra-realistic editorial portrait photography with soft Douyin-inspired beauty styling, realistic skin texture, luminous pores, natural facial contours, glossy lips, detailed hair movement, satin and rose material realism, and premium studio fashion finish. Color Palette: Warm neutral studio base with ivory or dark wardrobe contrast, deep red rose emphasis, soft pink beauty tones, realistic skin reflections, and elegant cinematic shadow contrast. Lighting: Single large spotlight creating a circular light projection behind the subject, dramatic studio shadows, soft frontal facial clarity, controlled satin highlights, and cinematic contrast around the bouquet. Camera: High-end studio portrait camera, slightly turned three-quarter over-shoulder angle, realistic lens compression, sharp facial and bouquet detail, and clean editorial crop. Materials: Physical satin sheen, rose petal texture, realistic skin, natural hair strands, delicate straps or tailored fabric edges, and crisp bouquet stems without plastic-looking surfaces. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
